brief: U.S. politics dominate news with Arizona primary results and a stopgap spending bill, while severe storms and a tropical threat hit the country. In research, papers explore generative AI for dementia care, visual query tools for logic programming, and LLM code explanations tailored to diverse users.
news_summary: Arizona Republicans nominated election denier Alexander Kolodin for secretary of state and Andy Biggs for governor; the House passed a stopgap funding bill to avert a shutdown. Meanwhile, a Saudi-U.S. nuclear deal faces opposition, and tropical Storm Bertha approaches the Gulf Coast.
papers_summary: Research on generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care highlights ethical considerations, while a visual query tracer for Datalog reasoning aids learning. Other works examine rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation and LLM code explanations adapting to problem-solvers' styles.

en.brief: U.S. politics dominate news with Arizona primary results and a stopgap spending bill, while severe storms and a tropical threat hit the country. In research, papers explore generative AI for dementia care, visual query tools for logic programming, and LLM code explanations tailored to diverse users.
en.news_summary: Arizona Republicans nominated election denier Alexander Kolodin for secretary of state and Andy Biggs for governor; the House passed a stopgap funding bill to avert a shutdown. Meanwhile, a Saudi-U.S. nuclear deal faces opposition, and tropical Storm Bertha approaches the Gulf Coast.
en.papers_summary: Research on generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care highlights ethical considerations, while a visual query tracer for Datalog reasoning aids learning. Other works examine rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation and LLM code explanations adapting to problem-solvers' styles.

zh.brief: 今日焦点：厦门翔安机场即将启用，引发金门与台湾对安全和军事的担忧；乌克兰军总司令被撤换；英国新首相贝安德上任；此外，深圳地铁加强安检引发民怨，速卖通被欧盟重罚。
zh.news_summary: 翔安机场距金门仅三公里，台湾担忧军事与飞航安全；乌克兰总统泽连斯基解除军总司令瑟尔斯基职务；贝安德接任英国首相；深圳地铁突加强安检引发不满；速卖通因售非法商品被欧盟罚款5.5亿欧元。

todays_image.caption: Both involve high-stakes counting—votes in a disputed election and enrichment levels in a nuclear deal—where trust in the process is fragile.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Voting machine used in the 2000 Presidential election
